# The Cockroach Janta Party

> A satirical Indian political movement for the overqualified, underpaid and politically frustrated. Five demands. Zero sponsors. One stubborn swarm. Founded 2026.

The Cockroach Janta Party (TCJP) is a satirical political and civic platform reclaiming a slur thrown at India's burnt-out youth. The site publishes a manifesto of five non-negotiable demands, long-form essays on judicial reform, electoral integrity, women's representation, media monopoly and defection, plus field reports from real protests.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Movement overview, hero manifesto, live ticker.
- [Vision](/vision): Statement of purpose and mission.
- [Manifesto](/manifesto): The five non-negotiable demands.
- [Journal / Articles](/articles): Essays and dispatches on Indian politics.
- [Protests & Events](/protests): Field reports including the 6 June 2026 Cockroach March at Jantar Mantar.
- [Quotes](/quotes): Slogans and lines from the swarm.
- [News](/news): Curated press coverage and mentions.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Posters, photographs, on-ground imagery.
- [Members](/members): Public roll of the swarm.
- [Voice — Issues](/voice): Citizen-raised political issues.
- [Cockroach Tracker](/cockroach-tracker): Live momentum and unemployment indicators.
- [Membership Card](/card): Generate a satirical member ID.
- [Join the Swarm](/join): Free, lifelong membership form.
- [Press Kit](/press): Logos, copy, and contact for journalists.
- [Contact](/contact): Email and message form.

- [Privacy](/privacy)
